description: The AI monitors staffing forecasts, training cohort performance, and overtime trajectories — surfacing workforce risks 6 days before they impact service levels, not the morning they hit.

Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from Dynamics 365 WFM, 3 years of Snowflake call volume history, HR scheduling data, and the Marketing campaign calendar.

The AI models what-if staffing scenarios — 15 OT shifts vs. a hybrid approach — forecasting service level outcomes and budget impact before you commit. Tax season is modeled 6 days out at 15-minute interval resolution.

The AI identifies where workforce planning breaks down — training cohorts behind schedule, knowledge gaps slowing handle times, meeting overhead consuming capacity — and surfaces the root cause across Dynamics 365, HR, and training systems.
